<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">

<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>Rapport de projet — IFRI_MentorLink — Groupe 65</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link
    href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap"
    rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    /*
   STYLE MODERNE ÉPURÉ — IMPRIMABLE A4
 */
    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0
    }

    @page {
      size: A4;
      margin: 22mm 20mm 22mm 20mm
    }

    html {
      font-size: 11pt
    }

    body {
      font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
      color: #1a1a1a;
      background: #d0d0d0;
      line-height: 1.65;
      font-weight: 400;
      text-align: justify;
    }

    @media print {
      body {
        background: #fff
      }
    }

    .page-wrap {
      background: #fff;
      max-width: 210mm;
      margin: 24px auto;
      padding: 28mm 25mm;
      box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, .22);
      border-radius: 2px;
    }

    @media print {
      .page-wrap {
        box-shadow: none;
        margin: 0;
        padding: 20mm 18mm;
        border-radius: 0
      }
    }

    /* — Titres — */
    h1,
    h2,
    h3,
    h4,
    h5 {
      font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: #0a1e3f;
      line-height: 1.25;
      letter-spacing: -.015em;
    }

    h1 {
      font-size: 2.4rem;
      margin-bottom: .6em
    }

    h2 {
      font-size: 1.6rem;
      margin: 2em 0 .6em;
      padding-bottom: .4em;
      border-bottom: 2px solid #0a1e3f
    }

    h3 {
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      margin: 1.6em 0 .5em;
      color: #1f3454
    }

    h4 {
      font-size: 1rem;
      margin: 1.2em 0 .4em;
      color: #2e4870
    }

    h5 {
      font-size: .95rem;
      margin: 1em 0 .3em;
      font-weight: 600
    }

    p {
      margin: 0 0 .95em;
      text-align: justify;
      hyphens: auto;
      text-justify: inter-word
    }

    ul,
    ol {
      margin: 0 0 1em 1.4em
    }

    li {
      margin-bottom: .3em
    }

    strong {
      font-weight: 600;
      color: #0a1e3f
    }

    em {
      font-style: italic;
      color: #2e4870
    }

    /* — Liens — */
    a {
      color: #0a6f68;
      text-decoration: none;
      border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
      transition: .15s
    }

    a:hover {
      border-bottom-color: #0a6f68
    }

    /* — Code & technique — */
    code,
    pre {
      font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace;
      font-size: .86em
    }

    code {
      background: #f4f5f7;
      color: #1f3454;
      padding: 1px 6px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      border: 1px solid #e4e7eb
    }

    pre {
      background: #0a1e3f;
      color: #e8eaf0;
      padding: 14px 18px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      margin: 1em 0;
      overflow-x: auto;
      line-height: 1.5;
      font-size: .78rem;
      page-break-inside: avoid;
    }

    pre code {
      background: transparent;
      color: inherit;
      border: none;
      padding: 0
    }

    /* — Tables — */
    table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      margin: 1.2em 0;
      font-size: .92rem;
      page-break-inside: avoid;
    }

    th,
    td {
      padding: 8px 12px;
      text-align: left;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e7eb
    }

    th {
      font-weight: 600;
      color: #0a1e3f;
      background: #f4f5f7;
      border-bottom: 2px solid #0a1e3f
    }

    td:first-child {
      font-weight: 500
    }

    /* — Placeholders captures d'écran — */
    .screenshot {
      margin: 1.2em 0;
      padding: 60px 24px;
      border: 2px dashed #c4c4c4;
      border-radius: 8px;
      background: #fafafa;
      text-align: center;
      color: #6b6b6b;
      font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
      font-size: .84rem;
      page-break-inside: avoid;
    }

    .screenshot b {
      display: block;
      font-size: 1rem;
      color: #0a1e3f;
      margin-bottom: 6px;
      font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif
    }

    .screenshot small {
      display: block;
      margin-top: 8px;
      font-size: .78rem;
      color: #9a9a9a
    }


    /* Captures d'écran intégrées */
    .cap {
      margin: 1.4em 0;
      page-break-inside: avoid;
      text-align: center
    }

    .cap img {
      max-width: 100%;
      border: 1px solid #e4e7eb;
      border-radius: 8px;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, .08)
    }

    .cap-legend {
      font-size: .86rem;
      color: #5e7494;
      margin-top: 8px;
      font-style: italic;
      text-align: center
    }

    /* — Info box — */
    .box {
      padding: 16px 20px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      margin: 1.2em 0;
      border-left: 4px solid;
      page-break-inside: avoid;
    }

    .box-info {
      background: #f0f7ff;
      border-color: #3b82f6
    }

    .box-warn {
      background: #fff8e6;
      border-color: #f59e0b
    }

    .box-tech {
      background: #f4f5f7;
      border-color: #6b7280
    }

    .box h5 {
      margin-top: 0;
      color: #0a1e3f
    }


    /* Sections centrées avec contenu justifié */
    section {
      display: block;
      margin: 0 auto;
      max-width: 100%
    }

    section h2 {
      text-align: left
    }

    section h3,
    section h4 {
      text-align: left
    }

    section ul,
    section ol,
    section table {
      text-align: left
    }

    section li {
      text-align: justify
    }

    /* — Page de garde — */
    .cover {
      height: calc(100vh - 0px);
      min-height: 240mm;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 60px 40px;
      text-align: center;
      page-break-after: always;
    }

    .cover .logo-block {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-around;
      align-items: center;
      margin-bottom: 20px
    }

    .cover .logo-img {
      width: 130px;
      height: 130px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center
    }

    .cover .logo-img img {
      max-width: 100%;
      max-height: 100%;
      object-fit: contain
    }

    .cover .main {
      margin: auto 0
    }

    .cover h1 {
      font-size: 3rem;
      margin: .4em 0;
      color: #0a1e3f
    }

    .cover .subtitle {
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      color: #5e7494;
      font-weight: 400;
      margin-bottom: 2em;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .cover .module {
      display: inline-block;
      padding: 8px 18px;
      background: #0a1e3f;
      color: #fff;
      border-radius: 6px;
      font-size: .95rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: .04em;
      margin-bottom: 1em
    }

    .cover .info-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 30px;
      text-align: left;
      margin-top: 3em;
      max-width: 600px;
      margin-left: auto;
      margin-right: auto
    }

    .cover .info-block h5 {
      color: #5e7494;
      font-size: .78rem;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: .08em;
      font-weight: 600;
      margin-bottom: .4em
    }

    .cover .info-block p {
      margin: 0;
      color: #1a1a1a;
      font-size: .95rem;
      text-align: left
    }

    .cover footer {
      font-size: .86rem;
      color: #5e7494;
      margin-top: 30px
    }

    /* — Sauts de page — */
    .page-break {
      page-break-before: always
    }

    .page-break p {
      text-indent: 2em;
    }

    .no-break {
      page-break-inside: avoid
    }

    /* — Sommaire — */
    .toc {
      font-size: .95rem
    }

    .toc-item {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 6px 0;
      border-bottom: 1px dotted #c4c4c4
    }

    .toc-item.indent {
      padding-left: 22px;
      color: #5e7494
    }

    .toc-num {
      color: #5e7494;
      font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
      font-size: .84rem;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      margin-left: 12px
    }

    /* — Liste des membres — */
    .members-list {
      list-style: none;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0
    }

    .members-list li {
      padding: 6px 0;
      font-size: .96rem;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e7eb
    }

    .members-list li:last-child {
      border-bottom: none
    }

    /* — Chapitre header — */
    .chapter-tag {
      display: inline-block;
      font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
      font-size: .78rem;
      color: #0a6f68;
      letter-spacing: .18em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: .4em;
    }

    /* — Footer note (pieds de page si imprimés) — */
    @media print {
      body {
        font-size: 10.5pt
      }

      .no-print {
        display: none
      }

      h2 {
        page-break-after: avoid
      }

      h3,
      h4 {
        page-break-after: avoid
      }

      pre,
      table,
      .screenshot,
      .box {
        page-break-inside: avoid
      }
    }

    /* ── Maquettes visuelles ── */
    .mockup {
      font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
      margin: 1.4em 0;
      page-break-inside: avoid;
      border: 1.5px solid #d4dae4;
      border-radius: 12px;
      overflow: hidden;
      background: #f8f9fb
    }

    .mockup-bar {
      background: #0a1e3f;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      font-size: .74rem;
      color: #8a98ad;
      font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace
    }

    .mockup-bar .dots {
      display: flex;
      gap: 5px
    }

    .mockup-bar .dot {
      width: 10px;
      height: 10px;
      border-radius: 50%
    }

    .mockup-bar .dot.r {
      background: #ef4444
    }

    .mockup-bar .dot.y {
      background: #f59e0b
    }

    .mockup-bar .dot.g {
      background: #22c55e
    }

    .mockup-body {
      padding: 22px 26px;
      background: #fff
    }

    .mockup-legend {
      background: #f4f5f7;
      border-top: 1px solid #e4e7eb;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      font-size: .78rem;
      color: #5e7494;
      font-style: italic;
      text-align: center
    }

    .mk-field {
      margin-bottom: 14px
    }

    .mk-label {
      font-size: .78rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: #0a1e3f;
      margin-bottom: 5px;
      display: block
    }

    .mk-input {
      width: 100%;
      padding: 9px 12px;
      border: 1.5px solid #d4dae4;
      border-radius: 8px;
      font-size: .86rem;
      color: #1a1a1a;
      background: #fafaf9;
      box-sizing: border-box;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between
    }

    .mk-input.focus {
      border-color: #0a6f68;
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(13, 143, 134, .15)
    }

    .mk-input.filled {
      background: #fff;
      color: #1a1a1a
    }

    .mk-btn {
      display: inline-block;
      background: #0a6f68;
      color: #fff;
      padding: 11px 20px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      font-size: .9rem;
      font-weight: 600;
      width: 100%;
      text-align: center;
      margin-top: 4px;
      box-sizing: border-box
    }

    .mk-btn.ghost {
      background: #fff;
      color: #0a1e3f;
      border: 1.5px solid #0a1e3f
    }

    .mk-row {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px
    }

    .mk-row .mk-field {
      flex: 1
    }

    .mk-tag {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      background: #eef2ff;
      color: #3730a3;
      border: 1px solid #c7d2fe;
      border-radius: 6px;
      padding: 3px 10px;
      font-size: .8rem;
      font-weight: 500;
      margin: 2px
    }

    .mk-tag.green {
      background: #dcfce7;
      color: #166534;
      border-color: #bbf7d0
    }

    .mk-tag.red {
      background: #fee2e2;
      color: #991b1b;
      border-color: #fecaca
    }

    .mk-section-title {
      font-size: .72rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: .08em;
      color: #6b7280;
      margin: 16px 0 8px
    }

    .mk-info {
      background: #f0fdf4;
      border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 10px 14px;
      font-size: .82rem;
      color: #166534;
      margin-top: 10px
    }

    .mk-error {
      background: #fef2f2;
      border: 1px solid #fecaca;
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 10px 14px;
      font-size: .82rem;
      color: #991b1b;
      margin-top: 10px
    }

    .mk-divider {
      border: none;
      border-top: 1px dashed #e4e7eb;
      margin: 18px 0
    }

    .mk-toast {
      position: relative;
      background: #fff;
      border: 1.5px solid #e4e7eb;
      border-radius: 12px;
      padding: 14px 16px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 14px;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(10, 30, 63, .12);
      max-width: 400px;
      margin: 0 auto
    }

    .mk-toast .av {
      width: 44px;
      height: 44px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: #0a6f68;
      color: #fff;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 1rem;
      flex-shrink: 0
    }

    .mk-toast .tbody .name {
      font-weight: 600;
      color: #0a1e3f;
      font-size: .92rem
    }

    .mk-toast .tbody .msg {
      color: #6b7280;
      font-size: .82rem;
      margin-top: 2px
    }

    .mk-toast .timer {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 0;
      left: 0;
      height: 3px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0a6f68, #15a14a);
      border-radius: 0 0 0 12px;
      width: 60%
    }

    .mk-toast-wrap {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 20px;
      background: #f8f9fb;
      border-radius: 8px;
      position: relative
    }

    .mk-toast-pos {
      font-size: .72rem;
      color: #6b7280;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
      font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
      letter-spacing: .06em
    }

    .mk-modal-ov {
      background: rgba(10, 30, 63, .18);
      padding: 20px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center
    }

    .mk-modal {
      background: #fff;
      border-radius: 14px;
      border: 1.5px solid #e4e7eb;
      width: 100%;
      max-width: 440px;
      overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(10, 30, 63, .2)
    }

    .mk-modal-head {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 16px 20px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0
    }

    .mk-modal-head h4 {
      margin: 0;
      font-size: 1rem;
      color: #0a1e3f
    }

    .mk-modal-close {
      width: 28px;
      height: 28px;
      border-radius: 6px;
      background: #f4f5f7;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 1rem;
      color: #6b7280
    }

    .mk-modal-body {
      padding: 20px
    }

    .mk-pview-head {
      display: flex;
      gap: 14px;
      align-items: center;
      padding-bottom: 14px;
      margin-bottom: 14px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0
    }

    .mk-pview-av {
      width: 60px;
      height: 60px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: #0a6f68;
      color: #fff;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      flex-shrink: 0
    }

    .mk-pview-name {
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      color: #0a1e3f;
      display: block
    }

    .mk-pview-sub {
      font-size: .82rem;
      color: #6b7280;
      margin-top: 2px
    }

    .mk-flow {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0;
      margin: 16px 0;
      flex-wrap: wrap
    }

    .mk-step {
      flex: 1;
      min-width: 80px;
      text-align: center;
      position: relative;
      padding: 12px 6px
    }

    .mk-step .snum {
      width: 32px;
      height: 32px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: #0a1e3f;
      color: #fff;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: .86rem;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      margin: 0 auto 6px
    }

    .mk-step .snum.done {
      background: #15a14a
    }

    .mk-step .snum.active {
      background: #0a6f68;
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(13, 143, 134, .25)
    }

    .mk-step .slabel {
      font-size: .72rem;
      color: #6b7280;
      line-height: 1.3
    }

    .mk-arrow {
      color: #d4dae4;
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      padding: 0 2px;
      margin-top: -18px
    }

    .mk-flow-note {
      font-size: .78rem;
      color: #6b7280;
      margin-top: 8px;
      text-align: center;
      font-style: italic
    }
  </style>
</head>

<body>

  <!--
     PAGE DE GARDE
-->
  <div class="page-wrap">
    <section class="cover">
      <div class="logo-block">
        <div class="logo-img"><img
            src="data:image/png;base64,"
            alt="UAC" style="max-width:130px;max-height:130px;object-fit:contain"></div>
        <div class="logo-img"><img
            src="data:image/png;base64,"
            alt="IFRI"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="main">
        <span class="module">PIL1_2526_65 — 2025/2026</span>
        <div
          style="margin-top:14px;padding:12px 20px;background:rgba(10,110,104,.15);border-radius:10px;display:inline-block;text-align:center">
          <div style="font-size:.82rem;color:#c9c9c9;margin-bottom:4px">Application disponible en ligne :</div>
          <a href="https://ifri-mentorlonk.onrender.com"
            style="color:#15a14a;font-weight:700;font-size:1rem;text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:-.01em">https://ifri-mentorlonk.onrender.com</a>
          <div style="font-size:.7rem;color:#9a9a9a;margin-top:5px;font-style:italic">Ce nom a ete genere car toutes les
            variantes "ifri-mentorlink" etaient deja prises sur Render</div>
        </div>
        <h1>IFRI_MentorLink</h1>
        <p class="subtitle">Plateforme web de mentorat académique et professionnel entre étudiants<br>de l'IFRI</p>

        <div class="info-grid">
          <div class="info-block">
            <h5>Groupe</h5>
            <p>Groupe n° 65</p>
          </div>
          <div class="info-block">
            <h5>Niveau :</h5>
            <p>Licence 1</p>
          </div>
          <div class="info-block">
            <h5>Encadrants :</h5>
            <p>M. Armand ACCROMBESSI <br>Mme. Maryse GAHOU</p>
          </div>
          <div class="info-block">
            <h5>Date de soumission :</h5>
            <p>10 juin 2026</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="margin-top:2.4em;text-align:left;max-width:600px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto">
          <h5 style="color:#5e7494;font-size:.78rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:.6em">
            Membres du groupe</h5>
          <ul class="members-list">
            <li>Géovanni TOYHIN (GL) & ADJA Adédoyi Flavia (GL) — <em>Algorithme de compatibilité, Recherche de
                mentors,frontend</em></li>
            <li>KOUELO A. L. Bel-Mira (GL) & HOUESSOU Sergius (SI) — <em> Inscription, Connexion, Profil utilisateur,
                tables de la base de donnée</em></li>
            <li>AMAMION Hermas (SI) & TCHATI Minti Silas (GL) — <em>Rapport, Messagerie en temps réel, Historique des
                conversations</em></li>
            <li>BONOU Fançois de Paul (SI) — <em>Conception &amp; rapport</em></li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>

    </section>
  </div>


  <!--  SOMMAIRE
-->
  <br><br>
  <div class="page-wrap">
    <section class="page-break">
      <h2 style="border:none;margin-top:0">Sommaire</h2>
      <div class="toc">
        <div class="toc-item"><span>Remerciements</span><span class="toc-num">3</span></div>
